card_info.name: Zamazenta - 201/182
attacks:
[MMC] Strong Bash (70)
During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon equal to the damage done to this Pokémon.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Raticate - 202/182
attacks:
[C] Reckless Abandon (90)
Flip 2 coins. If both of them are tails, this Pokémon also does 90 damage to itself.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Meowth - 203/182
attacks:
[C] Paw-cket Pilfer
Choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into their deck.

[CC] Fury Swipes (20x)
Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

card_info.name: Kangaskhan - 204/182
attacks: [CC] Gentle Slap (50)

[CCC] Dizzy Punch (90x)
Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads.

card_info.name: Arven's Greedent - 205/182
card_info.card_text: Ability: Greedy Order When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may put up to 2 Arven's Sandwich cards from your discard pile into your hand.
attacks: [CC] Rolling Tackle (50)

card_info.name: Yanmega ex - 206/182
card_info.card_text: Ability: Buzzing Boost Once during your turn, when this Pokémon moves from your Bench to the Active Spot, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic Grass Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
attacks:
[GGGC] Jet Cyclone (210)
Move 3 Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

card_info.name: Arboliva ex - 207/182
attacks:
[G] Oil Salvo
Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon 6 times. (You can choose the same Pokémon more than once.) For each time you chose a Pokémon, do 20 damage to it. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

[CCC] Aroma Shot (160)
This Pokémon recovers from all Special Conditions.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Moltres ex - 208/182
attacks:
[RCC] Flame Screen (110)
During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 50 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

[RCCC] Evil Incineration
Discard a 182 from this Pokémon. If you do, discard your opponent's Active Pokémon and all attached cards.

card_info.name: Ethan's Ho-Oh ex - 209/182
card_info.card_text: Ability: Golden Flame Once during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Basic Fire Energy cards from your hand to 1 of your Benched Ethan's Pokémon.
attacks:
[RRRR] Shining Feathers (160)
Heal 50 damage from each of your Pokémon.

card_info.name: Cetitan ex - 210/182
card_info.card_text: Ability: Snow Camouflage Whenever your opponent plays an Item or Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to this Pokémon.
attacks:
[WWWC] Crushing Press (140+)
You may discard a Stadium in play. If you do, this attack does 140 more damage.

card_info.name: Dondozo ex - 211/182
attacks:
[WC] Avenging Billow (30+)
This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

[WWCC] Dynamic Dive (120+)
You may do 120 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

card_info.name: Electivire ex - 212/182
attacks:
[LC] Dual Bolt
This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

[LLC] High-Voltage Press (180+)
If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra Energy attached (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack does 100 more damage.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Mewtwo ex - 213/182
card_info.card_text: Ability: Power Saver This Pokémon can't attack unless you have 4 or more Team Rocket's Pokémon in play.
attacks:
[PPC] Erasure Ball (160+)
You may discard up to 2 Energy from your Benched Pokémon. This attack does 60 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

card_info.name: Regirock ex - 214/182
attacks:
[C] Regi Charge
Attach up to 2 Basic Fighting Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

[FCCC] Giant Rock (140+)
If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Stage 2 Pokémon, this attack does 140 more damage.

card_info.name: Cynthia's Garchomp ex - 215/182
attacks:
[F] Corkscrew Dive (100)
You may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

[FF] Draconic Buster (260)
Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Nidoking ex - 216/182
attacks:
[DDC] Tainted Horn (100)
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During Pokémon Checkup, put 8 damage counters on that Pokémon instead of 1.
[DDDC] Kingly Impact (240)

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Crobat ex - 217/182
card_info.card_text: Ability: Biting Spree When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may choose 2 of your opponent's Pokémon and put 2 damage counters on each of them.
attacks:
[DD] Assassin's Return (120)
You may put this Pokémon into your hand. (Discard all cards attached to this Pokémon.)

card_info.name: Arven's Mabosstiff ex - 218/182
attacks:
[C] Vigorous Tackle (30+)
If this Pokémon has no damage counters on it, this attack does 120 more damage.

[CCC] Boss Headbutt (210)
During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Boss Headbutt.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Persian ex - 219/182
attacks:
[CC] Haughty Order
Reveal the top 10 cards of your opponent's deck. You may choose an attack from a Pokémon you find there and use it as this attack. Shuffle the revealed cards into your opponent's deck.

[CCC] Cruel Slash (140)
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

card_info.name: Emcee's Hype - 220/182
card_info.card_text: Draw 2 cards. If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, draw 2 more cards.

card_info.name: Ethan's Adventure - 221/182
card_info.card_text: Search your deck for up to 3 in any combination of Ethan's Pokémon and Basic Fire Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

card_info.name: Judge - 222/182
card_info.card_text: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Archer - 223/182
card_info.card_text:
You can use this card only if any of your Team Rocket's Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.
Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Ariana - 224/182
card_info.card_text: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If all of your Pokémon in play are Team Rocket's Pokémon, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand instead.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Giovanni - 225/182
card_info.card_text: Switch your Active Team Rocket's Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Team Rocket's Pokémon. If you do, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

card_info.name: Team Rocket's Petrel - 226/182
card_info.card_text: Search your deck for a Trainer card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

card_info.name: Destined Rivals Pokemon Center Elite Trainer Box (Exclusive)
card_info.clean_name: Destined Rivals Pokemon Center Elite Trainer Box Exclusive
card_info.card_text:
Pokémon Trainers, be on high alert!
The nefarious Team Rocket is setting its latest plan into motion, and heroic Trainers are racing to stop it. Join forces with the likes of Cynthia and Garchomp ex, Ethan and Ho-Oh ex, or Arven and Mabosstiff ex… Or reconsider your loyalties and fight alongside Team Rocket’s Pokémon like Mewtwo ex—under the command of Giovanni! Choose a side, assemble your allies, and battle boldly in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals expansion!

The Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box includes:
•11 Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals booster packs
•Each booster pack contains 10 cards and 1 Basic Energy. Cards vary by pack.
• 65 card sleeves
• 45 Pokémon TCG Energy cards
• A player’s guide to the Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals expansion 6 damage-counter dice
• 1 competition-legal coin-flip die
• 2 plastic condition markers
• A box to hold everything, with 4 dividers to keep it organized
• A code card for Pokémon Trading Card Game Live

card_info.name: Destined Rivals Elite Trainer Box Case
card_info.clean_name: Destined Rivals Elite Trainer Box Case
card_info.card_text:
A Growing Storm of Stellar Strength!
Terawatts of electricity crash down from the sky in a tropical paradise, setting the stage for the supercharged Pikachu ex! With the power of a Stellar Tera Pokémon ex, it lights up the shoreline, revealing a parade of dragon Pokémon led by the towering Alolan Exeggutor ex! Archaludon ex and Latias ex round out the horde, while new ACE SPEC cards and more new Pokémon ex bring surprises of their own. Currents crackle and dragons roar in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Surging Sparks expansion!

Each sealed Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals Elite Trainer Box includes 10 elite trainer boxes.
Individual Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals Elite Trainer Boxes include:
• 9 Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals booster packs
• 65 card sleeves
• 45 Pokémon TCG Energy cards
• A player’s guide to the Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals expansion
• 6 damage-counter dice
• 1 competition-legal coin-flip die
• 2 plastic condition markers
• A collector’s box to hold everything, with 4 dividers to keep it organized
• A code card for Pokémon Trading Card Game Live

Please keep in mind that this Code Card listing represents a digital copy of the stated item for the Pokémon TCG Online and/or the Pokémon TCG Live games. You may receive the physical Code Card. card_info.name: Destined Rivals Build & Battle Box Display
card_info.clean_name: Destined Rivals Build and Battle Box Display
card_info.card_text:
Whose Side Are You On?
Pokémon Trainers, be on high alert! The nefarious Team Rocket is setting its latest plan into motion, and heroic Trainers are racing to stop it. Join forces with the likes of Cynthia and Garchomp ex, Ethan and Ho-Oh ex, or Arven and Mabosstiff ex… Or reconsider your loyalties and fight alongside Team Rocket’s Pokémon like Mewtwo ex—under the command of Giovanni! Choose a side, assemble your allies, and battle boldly in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals expansion!

Display contains 10 Destined Rivals Build & Battle Boxes.

Each box contains:
• A 40-card ready-to-play deck, including 1 of 4 unique foil promo cards
• 4 Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals booster packs
• A code card for Pokémon TCG Live

card_info.name: Destined Rivals Sleeved Booster Pack Art Bundle [Set of 4]
card_info.clean_name: Destined Rivals Sleeved Booster Pack Art Bundle Set of 4
card_info.card_text:
Collect each of the 4 unique art packs for Destined Rivals.
Each Destined Rivals Sleeved Booster Pack contains 10 random cards.

card_info.name: Destined Rivals 3 Pack Blister [Set of 2]
card_info.clean_name: Destined Rivals 3 Pack Blister Set of 2
card_info.card_text:
Collect each of the Destined Rivals 3 Pack Blisters.

Each 3 Pack blister comes with 3 Destined Rivals booster packs, 1 coin, and a promotional card.
